PC          Instruction         Machine Code
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
0x0000		addi sp,zero,256    00010000000000000000000100010011
0x0004		addi ra,zero,15     00000000111100000000000010010011
0x0008		addi sp,zero,10     00000000101000000000000100010011
0x000c		beq ra,sp,end       00000000001000001000011001100011
0x0010		sub ra,ra,sp        01000000001000001000000010110011
0x0014		jal zero,loop       11111111100111111111000001101111
0x0018		sw ra,0(sp)         00000000000100010010000000100011
0x001c		jalr zero,ra,0      00000000000000001000000001100111
0x0020		beq zero,zero,0     00000000000000000000000001100011
